title: Simple DPS Display
description: This is a simple mod that displays the current DPS (damage per second), that is dealt to the entity that you are looking at.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Simple DPS Display** is a client-sided mod for the **Fabric Loader** that displays the DPS (damage per second), that the entity that you are looking at is receiving. The DPS is displayed in Minecraft's **Action Bar** (text element above the **Hot Bar**), which does change color, based on the DPS. For a visual of this mod, please check out this mod's **Gallery Tab**, or play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lTBMOsEiVxQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
